roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR FTA 3-23-15 PROOF OF 4NAA,AA MEETINGS/BWDNC/X:COURT REMANDS PAROLEE NUNC PRO TUNC TO MARCH 23, 2015/X:COURT ISSUES NEW SENTENCE,/3000REIN/PAJ:38 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 12DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 03-01-2015 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/TN:MATTHEW WENTWORTH THRASHER/X:DA MOVES TO ADD VIOLATION #4 - UNAUTHORIZEDPOSSESSION OF PEPPER SPRAY/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/X:PAROLEE ADMITS TO COMMITTING VIOLATION #4 - UNAUTHORIZED POSSESSION OF PEPPER SPRAY/3000REIN/PAJ:9DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 9 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:VIOLATIONS #1, 2, & 3 ARE DISMISSED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 03-01-2015/X:COURT ORDERSPAROLEE TO ATTEND 4 NA,AA MEETINGS AND TO BRING PROOF TO THE COURT OF ATTENDANCE IN TOW WEEKS,  IF PAROLEE FAILS TO BRING PROOF, HE WILL BE REMANDEDBACK TO JAIL TO SERVE ADDITIONAL 10DAY,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/CONTD:PROOF OF NA,AA MEETINGS/DOP/
